use_cases: Display daily activity metrics in dashboards
Show user engagement trends over time
Render compact data visualizations in widgets
Represent progress or performance data with interactive hover states
Provide at-a-glance metrics in analytics interfaces
ai_summary: A compact bar chart component displaying activity metrics with interactive hover states. Features a minimalist flat design with subtle backdrop blur, animated pulse indicator, and smooth transitions. Shows labeled values on hover with a glass-morphism container aesthetic. Ideal for dashboard widgets and analytics displays in SaaS and fintech applications.
